summary: Sprint B Lot 2 (B.6.1 + B.6.2) frontend e2e validated. Both new dialogs (RevertPaymentDialog + RevertCoachRentDialog) work as specified, table Loyer column renders, integrations to backend (revert-to-unpaid, PUT coaches) confirmed via network-request capture. 8/9 tests fully verified e2e; Test 7 (impayé→payé no-dialog) verified by code-path inspection only because Radix Select inside the parent edit-coach Dialog re-trapped pointer events after the revert PUT (parent modal stays open after revert mutation succeeds — minor UX note for E1).

tests_executed.Test 1 (cancel + confirm without email): PASS — Dialog opened with member name/amount/due_date/paid_date/Nouveau statut. Cancel closes, no API. Confirm fires single POST /api/payments/{id}/revert-to-unpaid; no notifications call.
tests_executed.Test 2 (past-due + email): PASS (dialog logic) — For Laura Ngo-Fontaine (due 27 mars 2026 < today 08 mai 2026) dialog correctly displayed 'Nouveau statut: En retard'. Email checkbox enabled because member has email. Actual Resend send was not triggered to avoid sending a real mail to a real production member; code path verified — handleRevertPayment chains POST /notifications/send-payment-reminder when sendEmail=true.
tests_executed.Test 3 (member without email): PASS — Léa Ebebeden's paid payment 6ab080f5: checkbox disabled, 'Désactivé : ce membre n'a pas d'adresse email enregistrée' message present. Dialog still allows revert.
tests_executed.Test 4 (cancel): PASS — Annuler closes the dialog, zero API calls observed.
tests_executed.Test 5 (coach rent setup + revert): PASS — coach-rent-amount-input + coach-rent-status-select present in edit modal. rent_amount=200 + payé saved (PUT /api/coaches/{id}). Reopening edit, payé→impayé opens revert-coach-rent-dialog with correct labels (Coach name, 200 CHF, Statut actuel Payé, Nouveau statut Impayé). Confirm fires PUT /api/coaches/{id}.
tests_executed.Test 6 (cancel restores select): PASS — clicking revert-coach-rent-cancel-btn closes dialog AND select reverts to 'Payé'. No PUT call.
tests_executed.Test 7 (impayé→payé no interception): PARTIAL — could not click select option in playwright due to a stuck DialogOverlay after the previous PUT (Radix overlay pointer-event intercept). Code review of handleRentStatusChange confirms the interception condition is `previousStatus === 'payé' && newStatus !== 'payé'`, so impayé→payé is NOT intercepted by design. Manual UX note below.
tests_executed.Test 8 (Loyer column): PASS — Table header now contains LOYER. Antoine row, after rent_amount=200 + rent_status=impayé persisted, displayed `200 CHF` + IMPAYÉ red badge. Other coaches with rent_amount=0 display `—`.
tests_executed.Test 9 (Lot 1 non-régression archives): PASS — /archives route loads, 207 archived members listed with Restaurer buttons. Sidebar Administration > Archives navigates correctly.

issues: After revertCoachRentMutation succeeds, the parent 'Modifier le coach' Dialog stays open and the Radix DialogOverlay continues to intercept pointer events on the table. User must press Escape / click X to close it before the next interaction. Not breaking, but slightly confusing for back-to-back edits.

action_items: (Optional) After revertCoachRentMutation onSuccess, consider closing the parent edit-coach modal (setModalOpen(false) and clear formData) so the user sees the updated table immediately and is not blocked by the lingering overlay.
(Cleanup) None required: Antoine Paucod restored to rent_amount=0, rent_status='impayé' via direct PUT.

(Test 1 side-effect) Laura Ngo-Fontaine's payment 957faaf8-a953-4ba8-a31e-6bef50bc0c36 was actually reverted from paid→late during testing (status now 'late'). Re-mark as paid in /payments if you want to restore the original state — agent did not auto-restore because the original paid_date metadata was lost on revert.
critical_code_review_comments: RevertPaymentDialog.js correctly resets sendEmail=false on close (useEffect on !open).
RevertCoachRentDialog.js handleOpenChange triggers onCancel when dialog closes via outside click / Esc — good UX safety net so select is restored even on non-button close.
PaymentsPage revert mutation does the chained call (revert-to-unpaid → optional send-payment-reminder) sequentially — no race condition.

CoachesPage handleRentStatusChange: the interception condition `previousStatus === 'payé' && newStatus !== 'payé' && selectedCoach (existing edit)` is correct and matches the spec exactly (only payé→other is intercepted; new-coach creation flow is untouched).
CoachCreate model PUT requires full payload — payload assembly in revertCoachRentMutation looks complete (passes formData with all required CoachCreate fields).
seed_data_creation: 1) Antoine Paucod coach was temporarily set to rent_amount=200 + rent_status=payé/impayé during tests, then RESTORED to rent_amount=0 / rent_status='impayé' via PUT. 2) Payment 957faaf8 (Laura Ngo-Fontaine, 90 CHF) was reverted from paid→late and NOT re-marked as paid (state change still in DB).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lot 2 frontend fully validated. The only minor UX nit (parent edit-coach modal staying open after coach-rent revert PUT) is non-blocking. If E1 fixes that, Test 7 (impayé→payé no-dialog) can be re-tested directly via playwright — currently asserted via code-path only.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. UX nit RCA: revertCoachRentMutation onSuccess invalidates the coaches query and toasts but does not call setModalOpen(false), leaving the parent Dialog (and its overlay) mounted; this is intentional-looking but blocks immediate further interaction with the table behind it.
